name: guild-arch
description: Provides multi-perspective architectural reasoning through specialized agents, plus trust-boundaries security reasoning (SBD principles tagged [FORCING] vs [POSTURE], lethal trifecta, pit-of-success primitives, false-confidence traps, Semgrep/Gitleaks/zizmor scanning). Use when: user asks to 'review architecture', 'evaluate this design', 'check production readiness', 'scaffold a service', 'threat model this', 'is this exploitable', 'review security architecturally', or needs boundary, resilience, performance, or security-architectural analysis.
